name: Reflex Cat Meaty Stick Treat Withgame Andgoose 15g
description: Treat your cat to a rich, meaty reward with Meaty Sticks for Adult Cats with Game & Goose . Made with an impressive 95% meat and animal derivatives , these grain-free sticks deliver irresistible flavor while supporting your cat’s daily nutritional needs. Featuring a delicious blend of game and goose (30% combined) , these soft, easy-to-break sticks are perfect as a reward, training treat, or bonding snack. The high protein content helps support strong muscles, while added taurine promotes heart and eye health. Essential vitamins A, D3, and E help maintain overall vitality and a healthy immune system. With no grains and a high moisture content for palatability, Meaty Sticks are a wholesome, tasty indulgence your adult cat will love every bite packed with quality nutrition. Key Benefits 95% high-quality meat content With game & goose for a rich, natural taste Grain-free recipe for easy digestion High protein to support muscle maintenance Added taurine for heart and vision health Soft texture – easy to chew and portion Ideal as a treat or reward Feed as a treat. Always ensure fresh drinking water is available.
